what_it_does: Records metadata for a single channel attachment: an image asset posted to the design-assets channel, referencing a logo icon file.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
Target is an image URI pointing to design-assets/logo/Icon_ConceptV_VCircle (1).
standouts: References a specific logo icon concept image via an image:// URI.
Attachment type is categorized as images.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
File naming uses the attachment id as the filename.
concerns: Target URI contains spaces and parentheses which may require URL encoding in some consumers.
No descriptive caption or alt text is present.
notes: This is a minimal attachment ledger entry linking the design-assets channel to a logo icon image asset.
questions: What does the target image URI resolve to in storage?
Is the attachment referenced by any message or thread in the channel?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as an attachment ledger entry and does so; it records the attachment metadata as expected.
intention_signals: To create a durable, queryable record of an image attachment shared in the design-assets channel.
contribution: Provides a stable metadata record that maps a channel attachment id to its image asset target and ingestion timestamp, supporting retrieval and audit without altering the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment ledger entry for an image asset in design-assets referencing the logo icon Icon_ConceptV_VCircle.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog an image attachment shared in the design-assets channel so it can be referenced and retrieved later.
